Bash(sqlite3 /Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/pos.db "
SELECT va.name as attr_name, vo.value as opt_value, vo.id as opt_id, va.id as attr_id
FROM variant_attributes va
JOIN variant_options vo ON vo.attribute_id = va.id
ORDER BY va.name, vo.sort_order;
")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/pos.db "
SELECT pv.sku, pv.id as variant_id, GROUP_CONCAT\(pvo.option_id\) as option_ids
FROM product_variants pv
JOIN product_variant_options pvo ON pvo.variant_id = pv.id
GROUP BY pv.id
ORDER BY pv.sku;
")
Bash(sqlite3 pos.db "SELECT p.name, p.reorder_point, s.qty_on_hand, s.location_id FROM products p LEFT JOIN stock s ON s.product_id = p.id LIMIT 20;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/pos.db "SELECT p.name, p.reorder_point, s.qty_on_hand FROM products p INNER JOIN stock s ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE s.qty_on_hand <= p.reorder_point;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/pos.db "
SELECT p.name, p.reorder_point, COALESCE\(s.qty_on_hand, 0\) as qty
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN stock s ON s.product_id = p.id AND s.location_id = \(SELECT id FROM locations LIMIT 1\)
WHERE \(COALESCE\(s.qty_on_hand, 0\) <= 0 OR \(p.reorder_point > 0 AND COALESCE\(s.qty_on_hand, 0\) <= p.reorder_point\)\);
")

Bash(python3 -c "
path = '/Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/src/renderer/src/App.tsx'
with open\(path\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

old = '\\t\\t\\t\) : !onboardingDone ? \(\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t<OnboardingPage />'
new = '\\t\\t\\t\) : locChecking ? null : needsOnboarding ? \(\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t<OnboardingPage />'

if old in content:
    content = content.replace\(old, new, 1\)
    with open\(path, 'w'\) as f:
        f.write\(content\)
    print\('Done'\)
else:
    print\('NOT FOUND'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
path = '/Users/minkhant/Desktop/html/electron/mkjournal/src/renderer/src/pages/dashboard/dashboard.tsx'
with open\(path\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
# Find the grid section to replace

end   = content.find\('{/* Revenue Chart + Expense Pie */}'\)
if start == -1 or end == -1:
    print\(f'start={start} end={end}'\)
else:
    print\('found, start:', start, 'end:', end\)
    print\(repr\(content[end:end+60]\)\)
")
